name: Beef Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Brown ground beef, drain.
3. Stir in the next five ingredients; heat until bubbly.
4. Pour into a 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Cut biscuits in half to form 20 half circles.
6. Place cut-side-down around the edge of the casserole.
7. Sprinkle with cheese.
8. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, until biscuits are golden brown and cheese is melted.
